🎯 Sprint Score Setup
Define your scoring criteria. Each criteria carries a point value — the sum automatically drives the Trade Sprinter Score (1–10) in your Trade Log.
Total Points Possible
0
Active Criteria
0
Scale Mode
1–10
Points → Score Mapping
Scoring Criteria
Drag to reorder · Click to edit
🎯
No criteria yet
Add scoring criteria to define what makes a perfect trade
⚙️ How Scoring Works
📋
Per Trade
Criteria evaluated each time you log a trade. You mark them when filling in the trade form.
📅
Daily
Applies once per trading day — like following your morning routine or reviewing the market open.
⚡
Sprint Period
Tracked across the whole sprint — like hitting a weekly profit target or maintaining a win streak.
🔢
Auto-Calculated
Total points earned ÷ total possible = percentage → maps to 1–10 score in Trade Log.
🔗
Linked to Trade Log
When you log a trade, the Trade Sprinter Score picker shows your active criteria as a checklist. Check off what you followed — the score calculates automatically. You can still override manually.
Add Criteria
☑️ Checklist Mode: You manually check this off when logging a trade. If checked = full points, unchecked = 0 points.
⏰ Time Windows — Auto-scores by entry time
to
%
to
%
to
%
Other times
%
💡 9:30-11 AM = Prime Time, 11-12 = Good, After lunch = Lower score
📋 Pre-Market Checklist Items
💡 All items checked = 100%. Score = (checked items / enabled items) × 100
🛡️ Risk Management Rules
Position size contracts
Risk per trade $
R:R target R
💡 100% if ALL rules pass. Each failed rule deducts 33%.
⚡ Custom Auto-Score Condition
= %
💡 Example: emotion = "🎯 Focused" → 100% | pnl > 0 → 100%
🎚️ Manual Slider (0-10)
0 10
7 /10
💡 When logging a trade, you'll slide to rate this criteria 0-10. Useful for subjective assessments.

TTS AI Coach
Powered by Claude · Ready
🤖
Hey! I'm your AI trading coach. I can analyze your trade history, spot behavioral patterns, identify what's working in your playbook, and give you actionable feedback.

Try asking me to analyze your recent trades, or use one of the quick prompts on the right. 👉

QUICK PROMPTS

JOURNAL SUMMARY

Loading your stats...

AI SETTINGS

AI Coach requires an Anthropic API key. Your key is stored locally and never sent anywhere except Anthropic.
Import Trades
Select your platform, then drop in your export file — The Traders Sprint auto-detects and maps all columns.
CSV Export
📊
TradingView
Import from Trade History export in the Paper Trading or Strategy Tester
CSV Export
🏦
Interactive Brokers
Import Flex Query or Activity Statement trade execution report
CSV Export
⚡
TradeOvate
Import from the Performance Report or Trade History export in TradeOvate
📋 How to export from TradingView
1
Open TradingView → go to Paper Trading or open a Strategy on a chart
2
Click the Trade History tab in the bottom panel
3
Click the Export icon (↓) in the top-right of that panel
4
Save the .csv file and drop it below
⚠️ TradingView doesn't export live brokerage trades — only Paper Trading & Strategy Tester results are available via CSV.
📋 How to export from Interactive Brokers
1
Log in to IBKR Portal → go to Performance & Reports
2
Select Flex Queries → Create a Trade Execution Report
3
Include fields: Symbol, DateTime, Buy/Sell, Quantity, Price, NetCash, AssetClass
4
Export as CSV and drop it below. Activity Statements also work.
📋 How to export from TradeOvate
1
Open TradeOvate → navigate to Reports → Performance
2
Select your date range and account
3
Click Export to CSV in the top-right corner
4
Drop the file below — The Traders Sprint maps all TradeOvate columns automatically
📂
Drop your CSV file here
or click to browse — supports TradingView, IBKR, TradeOvate formats
